case_title: FIRESIDE CAMERA INC. VS UNITED PARCEL INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE CAMERA INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL INC. $2,363.56 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,389.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-24-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
